name: okta_app_refresh_access_token_reuse
description: OAuth2 access/refresh token reuse detected (app.oauth2.as.token.detect_reuse or app.oauth2.token.detect_reuse).

validation.notes: Portable. Zero detect_reuse events in 90d. Token reuse is a strong indicator of token theft - rare but high-signal. client.ipAddress maps to net.peer.ip.
